remarks: HEAT AND HOT WATER INCLUDED!!!  Updated (1st floor) 2-bedroom condominium in Stamford, minutes away from Stamford High and Rogers International Middle school. This unit features 2 bedrooms, one bath, living room, kitchen and a dining area. Additional amenities include one assigned off-street parking space (plenty of streets parking as well), extra storage in the lower level, and convenient on-site laundry facilities.  Easy access to the park across the street, shopping centers, dining, metro north, major high ways and more...
